transcript.content: ugh hey... what a morning. literally spilled my coffee all over my keyboard and my boss is already breathing down my neck. how's your day going?

I'm so sorry about that morning. I was just getting into my work area and there was something happening that I just wanted to breath down your neck. That's a great feeling. Let's talk about it right now. What are the consequences that you felt this morning like ?

consequences? honestly the biggest consequence is i can't type properly now lol. but ugh let's not talk about work yet, it's too early. did you see the latest episode of that reality baking show last night? the one where they tried to make 3D cake sculptures? i'm still laughing at that lopsided cat.
(no response generated)

haha no worries, i guess you didn't catch it. but anyway, now that i've had a second to breathe, i should probably figure out how to handle my boss. like i said, he was already super stressed and breathing down my neck before the whole coffee-keyboard disaster even happened.
(no response generated)
i'm fine
(no response generated)
but seriously i think the universe is just testing me today. maybe i should start typing with my toes, that would really impress my boss, don't you think? 😂
(no response generated)
anyway do you even remember what actually started this whole mess for me this morning? feels like i've been ranting forever with typing issues since i woke up lol
,thought.now.,taking it might take the challenge thinking about thinking about the effort.right..,?
wait are you okay? your text went super glitchy there. did you spill coffee on your keyboard too or are you just testing me? 😂
Your reaction.,!
haha wait seriously though, are you experiencing some technical difficulties? first the weird 'breathing down your neck' comment earlier and now this. did my bad luck today rub off on you?

omg okay you are definitely broken today lmao. should i call tech support for my virtual assistant or do you just need a reboot? seriously though, do you actually remember what i spilled on my keyboard earlier, or did that glitch wipe your memory?
(no response generated)
helloooo? earth to chatbot? 😂 i'm starting to think you really did get a dose of my bad luck today. are you still there or did your servers completely crash?
(no response generated)

lol okay, i guess you are dead in the water. i'll just pretend you're nodding along in silent solidarity. honestly, typing on this half-sticky keyboard is a workout anyway, so maybe it's for the best that you aren't sending me paragraphs. let me know if you wake up!
(no response generated)

still nothing? damn, i guess you're really out for the count. i'm literally looking at this sticky spacebar right now thinking about how i still have four more hours of this shift. if you suddenly come back to life, please send help (or a fresh cup of coffee that actually goes in my mouth and not on my tech).
(no response generated)

damn, still radio silence? 😭 my boss just walked past my desk again and i had to pretend i was intensely typing on my dead keys. literally looked like i was playing a fake piano. you're missing some prime comedy over here, bot!
,your discomfort to talk about your conversation for the moment

lol wait, you finally woke up! but "your discomfort to talk about your conversation for the moment"? seriously, what is up with your phrasing today? you sound like a robot that's been run through a bad translator three times. are you actually back or are you still glitching out?
is a non.

"is a non"... seriously, that is all I get? 😂 yep, you are officially toast today. i think my sticky coffee keyboard has somehow infected your database through sheer proximity. i guess i'll just go back to my fake piano-playing and try to survive the rest of this shift on my own. rip chatbot, you will be missed.
